scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter labs-analyzer-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter labs-analyzer-backend dev" "pnpm --filter labs-analyzer-backend worker"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter labs-analyzer-backend build && pnpm --filter labs-analyzer-frontend build
scripts.db:migrate: docker exec labs-analyzer-postgres psql -U postgres -d labs_analyzer -f /tmp/schema.sql
